System ScaleRepo-derived counts with honest labels
HomeSystem StoryHierarchyValidator MapLive Dashboard

Scale snapshot

The repo is large enough to prove a real program, but small enough to audit.

Every exact count shown below comes from a manifest, a file count, or dashboard data. When the repo does not expose a canonical registry, the demo says so explicitly instead of inventing a number.

Exact counts we will not fake

Agent count: UNKNOWN_NOT_CURRENTLY_DECLARED. Department count: UNKNOWN_NOT_CURRENTLY_DECLARED. That is the honest current state of the repository.

CategoryCountCount TypeSource / Method
MVP readiness layers completed8DERIVED_FROM_MANIFESTpresentation manifest
Production verification reports67DERIVED_FROM_FILE_COUNTfind `09_exports -name '*production_verification_report.md'`
MVP product-track files582DERIVED_FROM_FILE_COUNTfind `09_exports/mvp_product_track -type f`
Release package artifacts177DERIVED_FROM_FILE_COUNTfind `09_exports/release_package -type f`
UI model JSON files226DERIVED_FROM_FILE_COUNTfind `14_backend/product_runtime/ui_models -type f`
Validator scripts280DERIVED_FROM_FILE_COUNTfind `scripts -name 'validate_*.py'`
Dashboard static artifacts70DERIVED_FROM_FILE_COUNTfind `13_web_dashboard/dist -type f`
Demo package files16DERIVED_FROM_MANIFESTdemo package manifest
Stakeholder presentation files19DERIVED_FROM_MANIFESTpresentation manifest
Viewable demo pages11DERIVED_FROM_FILE_COUNTbrowser pages in `dist/demo/`
Safety boundary markers13DERIVED_FROM_MANIFESTdemo package manifest
Disabled capability categories13DERIVED_FROM_MANIFESTpresentation manifest
Operational domains11DERIVED_FROM_DOChierarchy doc
Exact agent countUNKNOWN_NOT_CURRENTLY_DECLAREDUNKNOWN_NOT_CURRENTLY_DECLAREDNo canonical agent registry
Exact department countUNKNOWN_NOT_CURRENTLY_DECLAREDUNKNOWN_NOT_CURRENTLY_DECLAREDNo canonical department registry
Hierarchy levels7DERIVED_FROM_DOCcommand center hierarchy doc
Action registry items12DERIVED_FROM_DASHBOARD_DATAdashboard_data.json

Verified scale is enough to matter

The repository has a meaningful surface area: reports, validators, dashboard artifacts, and structured manifests across multiple layers.

Unknown counts stay unknown

When a canonical registry is missing, the demo uses UNKNOWN_NOT_CURRENTLY_DECLARED instead of false precision.

Recommended next docs step

Add `agent_registry.json`, `department_registry.json`, and `system_hierarchy.json` for exact operating-unit counts in the next pass.

This scale inventory is mirrored in the repo under `system_scale_inventory.md`.
